embedDescription:
Stay informed and never miss a beat! Use the interactive buttons below to customize your alerts and receive real-time notifications for the categories that matter most to you.

We currently offer live alerts for: Exclusive deals, High & Low value trades, Robux, and CS2 skins. Simply click the "Notify Me" button under your preferred category to join.

buttons.label: :dahood: ## CS2
buttons.description: - Posts from users with $1, $5, $10+ in CS2 skins

buttons.label: :rwrobux: ## Robux
buttons.description: - Posts from users Robux worth 1 to 1M and more

buttons.label: :crypto: ## Exchanges
buttons.description: - Posts from users Cryptocurrencies worth 1 to 500k

buttons.label: :discord: ## Discord
buttons.description: - Posts from users with Discord Accounts, Nitros or boosts and more

buttons.label: :ig: ## Social Media
buttons.description: - Posts from users Social Media Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, X...
